title: GitmindConfigV1
description: Configuration for the gitmind file-watcher and code-map generator.

$schema.description: URL or short tag identifying the config schema version. Must match one of the known versions.

include.description: Glob patterns (relative to repo root) of files to include.

exclude.description: Glob patterns to exclude. Applied after include.

respect_gitignore.description: Honor .gitignore files when walking the tree.

max_file_bytes.description: Skip files larger than this. Prevents minified-bundle stalls.

skip_submodules.description: Skip paths under any submodule root listed in .gitmodules. Set false to fold submodule sources into the parent's index.

debounce_ms.description: Coalesce file events within this window.

live_l2.description: Eagerly compute L2 (docs + call graph) on every change instead of on-demand.

file_map_lru.description: Maximum number of extracted FileMaps to keep hot in memory.

transport.description: MCP transport. Only stdio is wired in v1.

languages.description: Per-language overrides keyed by language name (matches tree-sitter-language-pack identifiers).

enabled.description: Disable extraction for this language without removing it from scan globs.
